improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try 3 free searches, then join from US$2/day."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, unlimited workspace. Start with 3 free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://yourdomain.com/og-image.jpg"><meta property="og:url" content="https://yourdomain.com/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business. Try 3 free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day.">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating the product value and free trial offer. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional, consistent previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or Twitter—critical for a B2B audience. Including the pricing anchor and free searches creates urgency without overpromising.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace built for business owners and professionals. Try three searches free — no card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately names the product and clarifies its purpose, building trust and recognition. The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while emphasizing the risk-free trial with 'no card required' to reduce friction and boost conversions. Copy stays factual and within provided context.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: After your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to become a Gideon member to continue accessing unlimited AI-powered trade and business support. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, billed monthly—or save 30 percent with an annual plan. As a member, you'll unlock unlimited queries, voice chat, and your own dedicated workspace.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the conversion funnel—what happens when free trials end. By clearly explaining the transition and immediately reinforcing the low entry price and value (unlimited access, voice chat, workspace), it reduces uncertainty and encourages sign-up.
